programs.title: The Masked Singer U.K.
programs.desc: Six more incognito celebrity singers take to the stage. Air Fryer takes on Bubble Tea, Owl faces Eiffel Tower and Chicken Caesar goes up against Piranha. One of them will be unmasked at the end of the show.

programs.title: NCIS
programs.desc: After receiving intelligence on deadly threats to multiple locations that could lead to a catastrophic war, NCIS is called in to try to neutralize the danger.

programs.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programs.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programs.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programs.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programs.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programs.desc: A mysterious death in a hotel leads the squad into the world of professional fighting. Benson tries to convince a victim to come forward for the sake of his friend.

programs.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programs.desc: An unconscious and injured teen abandoned outside a hospital sends the SVU on a search for the people who left her there. Benson faces serious consequences when she chooses to protect a victim's secret under the pressure of cross examination.
